info.title: Branches
info.description:
This service allows TPPs to provide their customers with easy access to information about the physical locations of the banks branches, including addresses, contact details, and hours of operation.

![JOF1](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2023-12/jpc-internal-jof-banner.png)

---

**_This is the initial draft of the Jordan Open Finance specification_**

The services in this Open API specification are Direct-Call Services (DCS). These services can be accessed by direct calls to the banks or by using an aggregator central hub such as JoPACC. However, the URLs and routes for these services are designed for direct-calls only.

- For the Open API specification of the aggregated services, refer to the Aggregator Services specification.

Services in Jordan Open Finance Specification (JOF) are divided into 4 categories based on their content and nature of consent.

# **Facilities and Products Services (FPS)**
This category includes services that specifically provide data about the Financial Institution's facilities and products. It does not contain any information about the customers or require their consent.

The Branch service is one of the FPS services and it provides detailed information about the physical locations of the banks branches.

### **Overview**

---
The **Branches** services help TPPs show their customers where the nearest bank branches are. It gives details like addresses, phone numbers, and opening times. This makes it easier for customers to find and visit their closest branch. Plus, it's kept up-to-date and easy to use.

#### **Branch Services List**

**1. Get branches information**

**2. Get a specific branch's data**

### **Endpoint**

---

### **GET /institution/branches**

#### **Get branches information:** This service allows third-party applications to retrieve detailed information about bank branches. This service provides data such as branch addresses, contact details, opening hours, available services, and other relevant information.

|     | Resource | Method | EndPoint              |
| --- | -------- | ------ | --------------------- |
| 1   | branches | GET    | /institution/branches |

### **Parameters**

---

The table below outlines the inputs or configurations required for invoking the service.

|     | ParameterName           | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| --- | ----------------------- | ----------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | isAvailable             | Optional          | Filter by branch Availability; whether it's open or closed                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 2   | hasAccessiblityFeatures | Optional          | Filter by branch Accessibility; whether it has Accessibility features or not                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 3   | accessibilityFeatures   | Optional          | Filter by branch Accessibility Features                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 4   | services                | Optional          | Filter by branch Services                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 5   | attributes              | Optional          | Filter by branch Attributes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 6   | Pagination              | Optional          | includes three main filters: **1. Skip:** The number of resources to skip showing in this response. **2. limit:** The maximum number of resources to return in the response. **3. sort:** Sorting the response by creation date of the resources (ascending or descending) |

### **Headers**

---

The table below lists the HTTP headers that can be included in requests to provide additional information or configuration.

|     | HeaderName        | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --- | ----------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Authorization     | Required          | This header typically carries credentials, such as tokens or keys, allowing the server to authenticate the client's request and determine whether it has permission to access the requested resource. |
| 2   | x-interactions-id | Required          | This header is not a standard HTTP header, but it is used as a unique id for the interaction, used in all requests and responses that are related                                                     |
| 3   | x-idempotency-key | Required          | A unique identifier used to ensure idempotent API requests, preventing duplicate actions when the same request is made multiple times.                                                                |
| 4   | x-financial-id    | Optional          | A custom header potentially used in financial APIs to convey specific transaction or account identifiers.                                                                                             |
| 5   | x-jws-signature   | Required          | A custom header indicating the presence of a JSON Web Signature (JWS) for verifying the authenticity and integrity of API requests.                                                                   |

### **Endpoint**

---
### **GET /institution/branches/{branchId}**

**Get a specific branch's data:** This service lets you get details about a specific branch of an institution by providing its branch ID.


|     | Resource | Method | EndPoint                         |
| --- | -------- | ------ | -------------------------------- |
| 1   | branches | GET    | /institution/branches/{branchId} |

### **Parameters**

---

The table below outlines the inputs or configurations required for invoking the service.

|     | ParameterName | Required/Optional | Description                |
| --- | ------------- | ----------------- | -------------------------- |
| 1   | branchId      | Required          | branch id to inquire about |

### **Headers**

---

The table below lists the HTTP headers that can be included in requests to provide additional information or configuration.

|     | HeaderName        | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --- | ----------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Authorization     | Required          | This header typically carries credentials, such as tokens or keys, allowing the server to authenticate the client's request and determine whether it has permission to access the requested resource. |
| 2   | x-interactions-id | Required          | This header is not a standard HTTP header, but it is used as a unique id for the interaction, used in all requests and responses that are related                                                     |
| 3   | x-idempotency-key | Required          | A unique identifier used to ensure idempotent API requests, preventing duplicate actions when the same request is made multiple times.                                                                |
| 4   | x-financial-id    | Optional          | A custom header potentially used in financial APIs to convey specific transaction or account identifiers.                                                                                             |
| 5   | x-jws-signature   | Required          | A custom header indicating the presence of a JSON Web Signature (JWS) for verifying the authenticity and integrity of API requests.                                                                   |

## **UML Diagram**

---

![BranchesUML](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2024-05/branches_jgtkcn.png)

### **Data Dictionary**

---

The table below represents the API service fields and serves as a comprehensive reference detailing the meaning, format, and usage of each field, ensuring a consistent understanding of the service.

| #   | Field                   | Data Type           | JSON Path                                   | Description                                                                    |
| --- | ----------------------- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1   | getBranches             | N/A                 | N/A                                         | Method to retrieve branch information.                                         |
| 2   | data                    | array               | data                                        | Contains an array of branch objects.                                           |
| 3   | branch                  | N/A                 | data[]                                      | Represents an individual branch object.                                        |
| 4   | branchId                | string              | data[].branchId                             | Unique identifier for the branch.                                              |
| 5   | branchType              | enum                | data[].branchType                           | Type of the branch (e.g., fullService, ATM).                                   |
| 6   | institutionBasicInfo    | object(ComplexType) | data[].institutionBasicInfo                 | Basic information about the institution associated with the branch.            |
| 7   | isAvailable             | boolean             | data[].isAvailable                          | Indicates if the branch is available.                                          |
| 8   | workingHours            | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours                         | Working hours of the branch.                                                   |
| 9   | hasAccessiblityFeatures | boolean             | data[].hasAccessiblityFeatures              | Indicates if the branch has accessibility features.                            |
| 10  | accessibilityFeatures   | array               | data[].accessibilityFeatures                | array of accessibility features available at the branch.                       |
| 11  | routings                | array[ComplexType]  | data[].routings                             | array of routing information for the branch.                                   |
| 12  | services                | array               | data[].services                             | array of services offered at the branch.                                       |
| 13  | attributes              | array               | data[].attributes                           | array of attributes associated with the branch.                                |
| 14  | notes                   | string              | data[].notes                                | Additional notes or comments about the branch.                                 |
| 15  | branchInfo              | object              | data[].branchInfo                           | Detailed information about the branch.                                         |
| 16  | name                    | object(ComplexType) | data[].branchInfo.name                      | Name of the branch.                                                            |
| 17  | address                 | object(ComplexType) | data[].branchInfo.address                   | Address of the branch.                                                         |
| 18  | relatedSSts             | array               | data[].relatedSSTs                          | array of related self-service terminals (SSTs) available at the branch.        |
| 19  | sstId                   | string              | data[].relatedSSTs[].sstId                  | Unique identifier for the related SST.                                         |
| 20  | type                    | enum                | data[].relatedSSTs[].type                   | Type of the related SST.                                                       |
| 21  | isAvailable             | boolean             | data[].relatedSSTs[].isAvailable            | Indicates if the related SST is available.                                     |
| 22  | access24HoursIndicator  | boolean             | data[].relatedSSTs[].access24HoursIndicator | Indicates if the related SST is available 24 hours.                            |
| 23  | hasDepositCapability    | boolean             | data[].relatedSSTs[].hasDepositCapability   | Indicates if the related SST has deposit capability.                           |
| 24  | \_links                 | object              | data[].\_links                              | Contains links related to the branch.                                          |
| 25  | self                    | object(ComplexType) | data[].\_links.self                         | Self-reference link to the branch.                                             |
| 26  | institution             | object(ComplexType) | data[].\_links.institution                  | Link to retrieve information about the institution associated with the branch. |
| 27  | next                    | object(ComplexType) | \_links.next                                | Link to the next page of branches.                                             |
| 28  | prev                    | object(ComplexType) | \_links.prev                                | Link to the previous page of branches.                                         |
| 29  | last                    | object(ComplexType) | \_links.last                                | Link to the last page of branches.                                             |

### **Complex Types Dictionary**

---

The tables below represent a structured overview of composite data structures utilized within the API, detailing their constituent attributes and relationships.

#### **nameComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                                       |
| --------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | Specifies a complex type for name                                     |
| **Used in**     | **1.** institutionBasicInfo **2.** branchInfo                         |
| **JSON Path**   | **1.** data[].institutionBasicInfo.name **2.** data[].branchInfo.name |

#####

##### **_nameComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field** | Data Type | **JSON Path**                                     | **Description**                                                            |
| --- | --------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | enName    | string    | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name.enName           | The institution English Name                                               |
|     |           |           | data[].branchInfo.name.enName                     | The branch English Name                                                    |
| 2   | arName    | string    | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name.arName           | The institution Arabic Name                                                |
|     |           |           | data[].branchInfo.name.arName                     | The branch Arabic Name                                                     |
| 3   | tradeName | object    | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name.tradeName        | The institution trade or business name associated with a product or entity |
|     |           |           | data[].branchInfo.name.tradeName                  | The branch trade or business name associated with a product or entity      |
| 3.1 | enName    | string    | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name.tradeName.enName | The institution English name of the trade or business.                     |
|     |           |           | data[].branchInfo.name.tradeName.enName           | The branch English name of the trade or business.                          |
| 3.2 | arName    | string    | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name.tradeName.arName | The institution Arabic name of the trade or business.                      |
|     |           |           | data[].branchInfo.name.tradeName.arName           | The branch Arabic name of the trade or business.                           |

#

---

#####

#### **institutionBasicInfoComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                                   |
| --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing basic information about an institution. |
| **Used in**     | institutionBasicInfo                                              |
| **JSON Path**   | data[].institutionBasicInfo                                       |

#####

##### **_institutionBasicInfoComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field**                 | Data Type           | **JSON Path**                                                 | **Description**                                             |
| --- | ------------------------- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | institutionType           | enum                | data[].institutionBasicInfo.institutionType                   | The type or category of the institution                     |
| 2   | institutionIdentification | object              | data[].institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification         | Identification information associated with the institution. |
| 2.1 | schema                    | string              | data[].institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification.schema  | The schema or structure of institution identification.      |
| 2.2 | address                   | string              | data[].institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification.address | The address associated with the institution.                |
| 3   | name                      | object(ComplexType) | data[].institutionBasicInfo.name                              | The name or title of the institution.                       |
| 4   | institutionPhoneNumber    | string              | data[].institutionBasicInfo.institutionPhoneNumber            | The contact phone number of the institution.                |

#

---

#### **workingHoursComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                                               |
| --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing information about the working hours of the service. |
| **Used in**     | workingHours                                                                  |
| **JSON Path**   | data[].workingHours                                                           |

#####

##### **_workingHoursComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field** | Data Type           | **JSON Path**                 | **Description**                  |
| --- | --------- | ------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| 1   | sunday    | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.sunday    | The working hours for Sunday.    |
| 2   | monday    | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.monday    | The working hours for Monday.    |
| 3   | tuesday   | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.tuesday   | The working hours for Tuesday.   |
| 4   | wednesday | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.wednesday | The working hours for Wednesday. |
| 5   | thursday  | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.thursday  | The working hours for Thursday.  |
| 6   | friday    | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.friday    | The working hours for Friday.    |
| 7   | saturday  | object(ComplexType) | data[].workingHours.saturday  | The working hours for Saturday.  |

#

---

#### **dayComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                                               |
| --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing information about the working hours of the service. |
| **Used in**     | workingHours.\*                                                               |
| **JSON Path**   | data[].workingHours.\*                                                        |

#####

##### **_dayComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field**         | Data Type | **JSON Path**                            | **Description**                        |
| --- | ----------------- | --------- | ---------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 1   | isWorkingDay      | boolean   | data[].workingHours.\*.isWorkingDay      | Indicates if the day is a working day. |
| 2   | openingTime       | string    | data[].workingHours.\*.openingTime       | The opening time for the day.          |
| 3   | closingTime       | string    | data[].workingHours.\*.closingTime       | The closing time for the day.          |
| 4   | secondOpeningTime | string    | data[].workingHours.\*.secondOpeningTime | The second opening time for the day.   |
| 5   | secondClosingTime | string    | data[].workingHours.\*.secondClosingTime | The second closing time for the day.   |

#

---

#### **routeComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                    |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type representing the route information. |
| **Used in**     | accountBasicInfo                                   |
| **JSON Path**   | data[].accountBasicInfo.mainRoute                  |

#####

##### **_routeComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field** | Data Type | **JSON Path**                             | **Description**                        |
| --- | --------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 1   | schema    | string    | data[].accountBasicInfo.mainRoute.schema  | The schema or structure of the route.  |
| 2   | address   | string    | data[].accountBasicInfo.mainRoute.address | The address associated with the route. |

#

---

#### **\_linksComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                            |
| --------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type representing the related links information. |
| **Used in**     | **1.** \_links.\* **2.** data[].\_links.\*                 |
| **JSON Path**   | **1.** \_links.\* **2.** data[].\_links.\*                 |

#####

##### **_\_linksComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field** | Data Type | **JSON Path**             | **Description**                                         |
| --- | --------- | --------- | ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | href      | string    | /\_links.\*.href          | The hyperlink reference for the pagination.             |
|     |           |           | data[]./\_links.\*.href   | The hyperlink reference for a related service resource. |
| 2   | method    | string    | /\_links.\*.method        | The HTTP method for the associated href                 |
|     |           |           | data[]./\_links.\*.method | The HTTP method for the associated href                 |

---

#### **addressComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                          |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing information about the address. |
| **Used in**     | branchInfo                                               |
| **JSON Path**   | data[].branchInfo.address                                |

#####

##### **_addressComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field**    | Data Type | **JSON Path**                                     | **Description**                          |
| --- | ------------ | --------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| 1   | addresslines | array     | data[].branchInfo.address.addresslines            | The address lines of the branch.         |
| 2   | city         | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.city                    | The city of the branch.                  |
| 3   | state        | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.state                   | The state of the branch.                 |
| 4   | postcode     | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.postcode                | The postcode of the branch.              |
| 5   | phoneNumber  | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.phoneNumber             | The phone number of the branch.          |
| 6   | website      | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.website                 | The website of the branch.               |
| 7   | moreInfo     | string    | data[].branchInfo.address.moreInfo                | Additional information about the branch. |
| 8   | countryInfo  | object    | data[].branchInfo.address.countryInfo             | The country information of the branch.   |
| 8.1 | countryCode  | object    | data[].branchInfo.address.countryInfo.countryCode | The country code of the branch.          |
| 8.2 | countryName  | object    | data[].branchInfo.address.countryInfo.countryName | The country name of the branch.          |
| 9   | location     | object    | data[].branchInfo.address.location                | The location of the branch.              |
| 9.1 | latitude     | number    | data[].branchInfo.address.location.latitude       | The latitude of the branch.              |
| 9.2 | longitude    | number    | data[].branchInfo.address.location.longitude      | The longitude of the branch.             |

The Central Bank of Jordan has classified Open Finance consent into Account Information consent and Payment Initiation consent. The above categories are based on the CBJ's classifications and divide them further for the user's convenience.

Some useful links:

- [About JoPACC](https://jopacc.com)
